description: The SyncPlaybackEditor component is used to interact with and modify the playback of a Sync playback like a video, animation, or a sound player.

fields._playback: The playback to edit and influence with this component.
fields._sliderValue: The field to drive with the current playback of ``_playback``
fields._loopToggleSprite: The sprite URI field of the toggle loop button. Used to switch between a loop and a play once icon URI.
fields._speedField: The field used to change the speed of the playback of ``_playback``
fields._slider: The slider used to change the play head/position of ``_playback``.

methods.ToggleLoop: Toggles the looping property of the playback of ``_playback``

usage: Used commonly in inspectors and video players to allow interaction with playback fields directly.
